<!-- indicator: fig-density-matter -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-density-matter
#| fig-cap: 'Average Daily Density of Fine Particulate Matter, 2014, 2016, 2018, and 2020'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Average Daily Density of Fine Particulate Matter, 2014, 2016, 2018, and 2020.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-density-matter", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
